description.unified: Deals Magic Damage 3 times to enemies in front, knocking them back and reducing their Attack Speed by [15% -> 30%] and Magic Defense by [10% -> 35%] for 4 sec. Against non-hero enemies, each hit deals an additional Magic Damage.

Deals Magic Damage to 2 enemies and [inflicts Bind for 2sec -> roots them for 3.6 sec]. Enemies hit take continuous Magic Damage every 0.5 sec for 6 sec, and their Magic Damage taken is increased by [20% -> 30%].
Pulls enemies within range toward the center and deals Magic Damage 5 times. The final hit stuns them for [1sec -> 1.8 sec], and if they are not heroes, deals an additional Magic Damage.

Critical Hit Chance is increased by 150, and each time you deal damage, you inflict [Lea's Curse] on the target for 10 sec. [Lea's Curse]: Critical Hit Chance is reduced by [100 -> 250] and Attack is reduced by [10% -> 25%].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage [ (removed) increases by 100% -> dealt is increased by 80%].

dark.unified: Roots the target for [1 sec -> 1.2 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is [increased by 2000 -> increased by 1000], but the target is changed to all enemies.

dark.unified: Root duration is increased by [2 sec -> 0.9 sec].

light.unified: For 10 sec, the target's Magic Damage taken is increased by [15% -> 25%].

dark.unified: [ (removed) Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage dealt is increased by 100% -> Mana cost is reduced by 1000].

light.unified: For each enemy affected by [Lea's Curse], your Attack increases by [{2}% -> {2}%]. This effect stacks up to [{3} -> {3}] times and cannot be dispelled.

dark.unified: Reduces enemy M. Crit Resistance by [20% -> 25%] for 10 sec.

description.unified: [Area of Darkness] increases DMG by {0}%, and its last attack reduces the target's M.DEF by 30% for 7 sec.

dark.unified: On critical hit, reduces the target's Status Resistance by [200 -> 250] for 10 sec and reduces the cooldown of all [except the skill in use -> other] skills by 2%.

description.unified: Upon a Critical Hit, reduces [Healing Rate by 35% -> Heal Rate of the target by 50%] and increases own [Critical Damage -> Crit DMG] by {0}% for 10 sec. [Critical Damage -> Crit DMG] increase effect can be stacked up to max 20 times.
